diagrams.title: Timestamp Ordering Protocol Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing decision process for read and write operations based on timestamps
elements: For READ: Compare TS(T) with WTS(Q)
For WRITE: Compare TS(T) with RTS(Q) and WTS(Q)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the decision logic in TSO for allowing or rejecting operations

diagrams.title: Timestamp Comparison on Timeline
diagrams.description: Visual representation of transactions on a timeline showing relative ordering
elements: Arrows showing valid and invalid read/write ranges
diagrams.purpose: Visualize timestamp ordering and understand which operations are allowed based on temporal relationships

diagrams.title: Thomas' Write Rule Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Decision tree for Thomas' Write Rule showing three possible outcomes for a write operation
diagrams.purpose: Understand the modified write rule and its three possible outcomes

diagrams.title: Comparison: Lock-based vs Timestamp Ordering
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of lock-based and timestamp ordering approaches
elements: Lock-based: Blocks, Deadlock possible, Cascading rollback possible
Timestamp Ordering: Rollback, No deadlock, No cascading rollback
Table showing differences in deadlock, cascade, blocking, implementation complexity
diagrams.purpose: Contrast TSO with traditional lock-based approaches
